name: NDMO_DGV
description: Governance authority, CDO/steward roles, accountability frameworks, and oversight for Saudi government data assets.

name: NDMO_CAT
description: Comprehensive data catalog, metadata management, data discovery, and lineage tracking.

name: NDMO_QUA
description: Data accuracy, completeness, validation rules, quality scoring, anomaly detection, and remediation governance.

name: NDMO_OPS
description: Retention and archival policies, lifecycle management, backup, and data disposal controls.

name: NDMO_ARC
description: Secure data architecture patterns, storage encryption, integration security, and interoperability standards.

name: NDMO_SHR
description: Controlled data sharing, private endpoint enforcement, public access restrictions, and sharing audit trails.

name: NDMO_CLS
description: NDMO classification taxonomy (Critical/High/Medium/Low), automated labelling, classification registry.

name: NDMO_PRV
description: Personal Data Protection Law: consent, data subject rights, privacy by design, breach notification.

name: NDMO_SEC
description: Encryption at rest/in transit, access control, vulnerability management, security monitoring, and audit logging.
